Why choose Four Walls

Your trusted partner in every property.

Buying a property

Browse a curated selection of properties across Thessaloniki and find the one that suits you.

Renting a property

Find the right rental, with clear filters and personal guidance.

Selling a property

Entrust us with your property and sell smartly, quickly and at the right price.

Your next home, with confidence.

Who we are

Your property partner in Thessaloniki.
We know the Thessaloniki market inside out and guide you at every step, with a personal touch.

  • Realistic valuations backed by market data
  • Updates at every step, with no delays
  • Personal guidance from the first viewing to the signing
  • Completed deals and satisfied clients across Thessaloniki
